inputs.prompt: What happened: A ceiling panel collapsed in the reception area of Clearwater Analytics' Manchester office during business hours, injuring two employees. Both received first aid on site and one was taken to hospital with a minor head injury and has since been discharged. The building was evacuated and structural engineers are assessing the premises. The cause is under investigation. Organisation: Clearwater Analytics (technology company).

What happened: Customer data was exposed online due to a software error. Approximately 500 records affected. Discovered internally. No evidence of malicious access. Organisation: Small e-commerce company called Oakwood Trading.

What happened: A clinical trial participant at a hospital partnering with Nordic Health Initiative suffered a serious adverse reaction during a study of a new treatment protocol. The participant is in stable condition. The trial has been paused across all participating hospitals in three Nordic countries. The relevant national medicines agencies have been notified. The cause of the reaction is under investigation. Organisation: Nordic Health Initiative. Harm: Yes — one person hospitalised, currently stable. Target audience: General public and healthcare community.
